status: 24-Apr-2026: Technical workshop focused on the Facilio-Corrigo integration. Invoicing for Corrigo work orders is now enabled in Facilio, site verification was simplified, integration error states were resolved, and the check-in/check-out button was combined. The critical blocker remains bulk closure of approximately 2,000 open Corrigo work orders, with the related ticket already 1-2 weeks old and awaiting Krishna's follow-up.

active_risks.text: Bulk close of approximately 2,000 Corrigo work orders is blocking Metro operational hygiene and is 1-2 weeks overdue
Manual merge of 330 inspection work orders remains an ongoing labor burden

open_items.text: Resolve bulk close ticket for approximately 2,000 Corrigo work orders
Explore bulk PM trigger date update for 1,200+ sites
Inform account managers of NTE access

recent_decisions.text: Corrigo work order invoicing is live in Facilio
Combined check-in/check-out button has been implemented
NTE access granted to account managers
